title: Create Stuff 'N Additions x Sable & Aeronautics Compat
description: Makes Create: Stuff and additions fully compatible with sable/simulated/aeronautics. Also patches some bugs.
body:
## [What includes]
This mod just patches bugs and compatibility issues beetwen [Sable](https://modrinth.com/mod/sable), [Create: Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics) and [Create: Stuff 'N Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-stuff-additions).

### [Featuring]
- JetPack sublevel floor detection 
- Grapplin sublevel hooking (very fun tbh) 
- Block Picker sublevel interaction (can take and place blocks from/to sublevels from/to main level) 
- Grapplin item working in offhand (isn't able to create 2 chains at the same time) 

### [Configurable]
- Hide netherite jetpack / exoskeletons from first person view (client config) 
- The selection of block entities with 'Block Picker' is disabled, as in some cases block data was lost. (common config).
  
### [Fixes to vanilla Stuff&Additions]
- Grapplin hooking to sublevels crashing the game 
- Floating blocks crashing the game when colliding with sublevels 

_-Last version depends on Sable >=1.2.2 and Create Stuff&Additions >= 2.1.3-_
